prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training - high carbohydrate intake for endurance performance and recovery

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all meals for one full day (breakfast, lunch, dinner, snacks)
Emphasizes carbohydrate-rich foods appropriate for endurance athlete caloric needs (~3000-3500 kcal)
Plan is compact and concise (under 400 words)
Includes timing or context relevant to marathon training nutrition
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a professional endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring high caloric intake and carbohydrate loading focus

prompt_inputs.goal: Muscle recovery and strength gains post-training

solution_criteria: Meal plan spans exactly 1 day with 4-5 meals
Protein distributed across meals (minimum 25g per meal for muscle recovery)
Total daily protein intake aligns with strength athlete needs (1.6-2.2g per kg body weight)
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (weightlifter) emphasizing protein distribution and muscle recovery across meals

solution_criteria: Meal plan contains exactly 1 day of meals (breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snacks)
All foods are vegan with no animal-derived ingredients
Includes adequate plant-based protein sources (legumes, tofu, nuts, seeds, whole grains) appropriate for an 82kg athlete
Plan is compact and concise (brief descriptions, not lengthy explanations)
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a sport-specific dietary restriction (vegan basketball player) to verify plant-based protein sourcing and nutrient balance

prompt_inputs.goal: Optimize performance and recovery for evening soccer match with proper pre-game, during-game, and post-game nutrition timing

solution_criteria: Meal plan spans full day with specific timing for pre-match (2-3 hours before), during-match (if applicable), and post-match recovery meals
Includes appropriate macronutrient balance for soccer performance (carbohydrates for energy, adequate protein for recovery)
All meals and snacks respect vegetarian and nut-free restrictions
Plan is concise and fits on one page without excessive detail
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with an athlete in active competition day (soccer match in evening) requiring timing-specific pre-game, during-game, and recovery nutrition

prompt_inputs.goal: Optimize energy and recovery for competitive swimming training (6 days/week, 2 hours daily)

solution_criteria: Meal plan spans 24 hours with 4-5 eating occasions aligned to training schedule
Portions and calorie distribution appropriate for teenage athlete growth and training demands
Includes hydration and electrolyte guidance for swimming recovery
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a young adolescent athlete (teenage swimmer) with age-appropriate portions, growth needs, and school/training schedule integration
